input.question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance

data.original_question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance
data.intent: User wants a comprehensive view of their equity portfolio including a list of holdings, daily profit and loss, sector diversification, and year-to-date return.

decomposition.sub_question: What are my current stock holdings?
decomposition.title: Portfolio Holdings
decomposition.description: List of all equity positions currently held in the portfolio

decomposition.sub_question: What is my portfolio's daily profit and loss?
decomposition.title: Daily P&L
decomposition.description: Total monetary gain or loss for the portfolio today

decomposition.sub_question: How is my portfolio allocated across sectors?
decomposition.title: Sector Allocation
decomposition.description: Percentage breakdown of the portfolio by industry sector

decomposition.sub_question: What is my portfolio's year-to-date return?
decomposition.title: YTD Performance
decomposition.description: Total percentage return of the portfolio from the start of the year to today
